---
title: "aria_nbv Package (Legacy Stub)"
format: html
---

This page is intentionally kept as a compatibility stub and is no longer part
of the main navigation.

Use these pages instead:

- Current package map: [aria_nbv Overview & Architecture](aria_nbv_overview.qmd)
- Current repo ownership map: [Repository Structure](../repo_structure.qmd)
- Current app and data flow: [ASE Data Pipeline & Streamlit Usage](data_pipeline_overview.qmd)
- Current oracle pipeline: [aria_nbv Implementation Overview](oracle_rri_impl.qmd)
- Current model surface: [View Introspection Network (VIN) on EVL](vin_nbv.qmd)
- Generated signatures and docstrings: [API Reference](../../reference/index.qmd)
